sync_excel.integration.description: Upload CSV files, preview mappings, and run file-based imports through Data Sync.
sync_excel.integration.title: Excel / CSV Import
sync_excel.upload.errors.fileRequired: Select a CSV file to upload.
sync_excel.upload.errors.invalidType: Only CSV uploads are supported in this foundation slice.
sync_excel.widget.disabled.message: Enable this integration to upload CSV files and start imports.
sync_excel.widget.disabled.title: Integration disabled
sync_excel.widget.matchStrategy.customDe: Advanced option. Use only if you know how existing records should be identified in this import.
sync_excel.widget.matchStrategy.customWa: Custom matching may create duplicates if the mapped fields do not uniquely identify a person.
sync_excel.widget.matchStrategy.emailDes: Matches people by email. Works best when each person has one reliable, unique email address.
sync_excel.widget.matchStrategy.external: Best for repeated imports from the same source. Future imports update the same people instead of creating duplicates.
sync_excel.widget.matchStrategy.help: This decides whether imported rows update existing people or create new ones.
sync_excel.widget.matchStrategy.label: How to match existing people
sync_excel.widget.preview.description: Every source column stays visible here. Leave a target empty to keep the column unmapped for now.
sync_excel.widget.preview.title: Preview and mapping
sync_excel.widget.run.description: The import runs in the background through Data Sync and updates this view as progress changes.
sync_excel.widget.run.title: Import run status
sync_excel.widget.upload.description: Upload a CSV file, review the suggested people mapping, and start a background import run.
sync_excel.widget.upload.title: Upload CSV
sync_excel.widget.validation.duplicateRi: Diese Zuordnung verwendet nicht die empfohlene Strategie Externe ID oder E-Mail. Ein erneuter Import desselben Datensatzes kann doppelte Personen erzeugen.
sync_excel.widget.validation.duplicateTa: Each target field can only be mapped once in this foundation slice: {targets}
sync_excel.widget.validation.identityMes: Map either External ID or Primary email so reimports can match existing people.
sync_excel.widget.validation.nameMessage: Map Last name or Display name so the importer can build person records.
sync_excel.widget.validation.readyMessag: The current mapping is valid for the first customers.person slice.
sync_excel.widget.validation.reimportMes: Ein weiterer Import aus derselben hochgeladenen CSV kann Duplikate erzeugen, wenn die Abgleichstrategie bestehende Personen nicht zuverlässig erkennt.
sync_excel.widget.validation.reimportTit: Für diesen Upload gibt es bereits einen Lauf
